# Muthu Creatives

> Muthu Creatives is a web design agency in Houston, TX, founded and led by Lee Muthu.
> The agency builds custom websites, web apps, automations and SEO for small and
> mid-sized businesses across the United States. Every project is designed and coded
> from scratch, with no templates or page builders, and priced as a fixed quote in
> writing after a discovery call. Lee leads every engagement personally as the client's
> point of contact from the first call through launch, working alongside the designers
> and developers who help build each project.

## Key facts

- Founder and lead: Lee Muthu (Computer Science, University of Houston)
- Location: Houston, Texas, serving clients nationwide
- Contact: info@muthucreatives.com
- Booking: free 20-minute intro call, bookable directly on every page
- Pricing: fixed quotes in writing after a free discovery call, scoped to each
  project. No published price list and no hourly billing.
- Typical timelines: landing pages about 1 week; business websites 2 to 4 weeks;
  web apps 1 to 6 weeks; automations days to a couple of weeks; SEO technical
  fixes in 1 to 2 weeks, with ranking movement taking longer
- Process: Discovery (free call), then Proposal (fixed scope and quote in writing),
  then Build (revisions included), then Launch (client owns all code and content)

## Services

- [Landing Pages](https://muthucreatives.com/services/landing-pages): single-goal,
  conversion-focused pages, custom coded, usually live within a week
- [Business Websites](https://muthucreatives.com/services/business-websites):
  multi-page sites for local businesses with local SEO and booking integration
- [Web Apps](https://muthucreatives.com/services/web-apps): dashboards, client
  portals, internal tools and MVPs built in React and TypeScript
- [Automations](https://muthucreatives.com/services/automations): tool integrations
  and workflows that eliminate manual, repetitive tasks
- [SEO](https://muthucreatives.com/services/seo): technical SEO, structured data
  and content structure built for both Google and AI answer engines (GEO)

## Case studies

- [Flowline](https://muthucreatives.com/portfolio/flowline): SaaS landing page,
  built and live in 48 hours
- [Maison Lumière](https://muthucreatives.com/portfolio/maison-lumiere): salon
  website with around-the-clock booking
- [Ember & Rye](https://muthucreatives.com/portfolio/ember-rye): restaurant site
  with a fully indexable HTML menu
- [Apex Analytics](https://muthucreatives.com/portfolio/apex-analytics): React
  analytics dashboard that replaced manual spreadsheet reporting
- [FlowForge](https://muthucreatives.com/portfolio/flowforge): visual workflow
  builder saving an operations team 3 hours per day
- [Maya Voss](https://muthucreatives.com/portfolio/maya-voss): creator
  link-in-bio landing page with email capture

## Other pages

- [About](https://muthucreatives.com/about): founder background and how the agency works
- [Contact](https://muthucreatives.com/contact): booking and project brief form
